message:
chore(beads): append v4x3 closed record + sync 5pnv closure

v4x3's DB record was lost during an earlier forced-flush; restored the
original JSONL entry (from .beads/issues.jsonl.pre_cc_redis_close) with
status=closed and a close_reason pointing at 212bcb8. 5pnv closed via
br in this commit too. Ships on the same JSONL export cycle.
